# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    host: users-upstream
    protocol: http
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    tags: [prod, microservice, users]
    routes:
      - name: users-api
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths: ["/users", "/users/"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 10
        request_buffering: true
        response_buffering: true
        tags: [prod, route]
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins: ["https://app.example.com", "https://admin.example.com"]
              methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]
              headers: ["Accept", "Accept-Version", "Authorization", "Content-Type", "Origin", "X-Request-ID"]
              exposed_headers: ["X-Request-ID", "X-RateLimit-Limit", "X-RateLimit-Remaining", "X-RateLimit-Reset"]
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false
          - name: request-id
            config:
              header_name: X-Request-ID
              echo_downstream: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              second: 50
              minute: 2000
              hour: 20000
              policy: redis
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              redis_host: redis
              redis_port: 6379
              redis_timeout: 2000
              redis_database: 0
          - name: ip-restriction
            config:
              deny: []
              allow: []
          - name: acl
            config:
              allow: ["public", "user", "admin"]
              hide_groups_header: true
          - name: jwt
            config:
              key_claim_name: iss
              claims_to_verify: ["exp"]
              run_on_preflight: false

  - name: orders-service
    host: orders-upstream
    protocol: http
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    tags: [prod, microservice, orders]
    routes:

        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths: ["/orders", "/orders/"]

        plugins:

              hide_groups_header: true

            config:
              key_claim_name: iss
              claims_to_verify: ["exp"]
              run_on_preflight: false

  - name: payments-service
    host: payments-upstream
    protocol: http
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 2
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    tags: [prod, microservice, payments]
    routes:
      - name: payments-api
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths: ["/payments", "/payments/"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 10
        request_buffering: true
        response_buffering: true
        tags: [prod, route]
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins: ["https://app.example.com", "https://admin.example.com"]
              methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]
              headers: ["Accept", "Accept-Version", "Authorization", "Content-Type", "Origin", "X-Request-ID"]
              exposed_headers: ["X-Request-ID", "X-RateLimit-Limit", "X-RateLimit-Remaining", "X-RateLimit-Reset"]
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false
          - name: request-id
            config:
              header_name: X-Request-ID
              echo_downstream: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              second: 20
              minute: 600
              hour: 6000
              policy: redis
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              redis_host: redis
              redis_port: 6379

              hide_groups_header: true
          - name: jwt
            config:
              key_claim_name: iss
              claims_to_verify: ["exp"]
              run_on_preflight: false

  - name: inventory-service
    host: inventory-upstream
    protocol: http
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    tags: [prod, microservice, inventory]
    routes:

        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths: ["/inventory", "/inventory/"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 10
        request_buffering: true
        response_buffering: true
        tags: [prod, route]
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins: ["https://app.example.com", "https://admin.example.com"]
              methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]

  - name: admin-service
    host: admin-upstream
    protocol: http
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    tags: [prod, microservice, admin]
    routes:
      - name: admin-api
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths: ["/admin", "/admin/"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 20
        request_buffering: true
        response_buffering: true
        tags: [prod, route]
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins: ["https://admin.example.com"]
              methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]
              headers: ["Accept", "Accept-Version", "Authorization", "Content-Type", "Origin", "X-Request-ID"]
              exposed_headers: ["X-Request-ID", "X-RateLimit-Limit", "X-RateLimit-Remaining", "X-RateLimit-Reset"]
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false
          - name: request-id
            config:
              header_name: X-Request-ID
              echo_downstream: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              second: 10
              minute: 300
              hour: 3000
              policy: redis
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              redis_host: redis
              redis_port: 6379
              redis_timeout: 2000
              redis_database: 0
          - name: acl
            config:
              allow: ["admin"]
              hide_groups_header: true
          - name: jwt
            config:
              key_claim_name: iss
              claims_to_verify: ["exp"]
              run_on_preflight: false

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
          http_statuses: [200, 204]
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 5
          http_statuses: [200, 201, 202, 204, 301, 302]
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          timeouts: 5
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
    tags: [prod, upstream]
    targets:
      - target: users-v1.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-v2.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 0

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
          http_statuses: [200, 204]
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 5
          http_statuses: [200, 201, 202, 204, 301, 302]
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          timeouts: 5
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
    tags: [prod, upstream]
    targets:
      - target: orders.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: payments-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
          http_statuses: [200, 204]
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 5
          http_statuses: [200, 201, 202, 204, 301, 302]
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          timeouts: 5
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
    tags: [prod, upstream]
    targets:
      - target: payments.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
          http_statuses: [200, 204]
        unhealthy:

      passive:

        healthy:
          successes: 5
          http_statuses: [200, 201, 202, 204, 301, 302]
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          timeouts: 5
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
    tags: [prod, upstream]
    targets:
      - target: inventory.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: admin-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
          http_statuses: [200, 204]
        unhealthy:
          interval: 10
          http_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 5
          http_statuses: [200, 201, 202, 204, 301, 302]
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          timeouts: 5
          http_statuses: [429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
    tags: [prod, upstream]
    targets:
      - target: admin.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

consumers:
  - username: public-client
    custom_id: public-client
    tags: [prod, consumer]
    acls:
      - group: public
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: public-client
        algorithm: HS256
        secret: "${{JWT_PUBLIC_CLIENT_SECRET}}"

  - username: app-client
    custom_id: app-client
    tags: [prod, consumer]
    acls:
      - group: user
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: app-client
        algorithm: HS256
        secret: "${{JWT_APP_CLIENT_SECRET}}"

  - username: admin-client
    custom_id: admin-client
    tags: [prod, consumer]
    acls:
      - group: admin
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: admin-client
        algorithm: HS256
        secret: "${{JWT_ADMIN_CLIENT_SECRET}}"

plugins:
  - name: prometheus
    config:
      per_consumer: true
      status_code_metrics: true
      latency_metrics: true
      bandwidth_metrics: true
      upstream_health_metrics: true
    tags: [prod, observability]

  - name: http-log
    config:
      http_endpoint: "http://log-collector:8080/kong"
      method: POST
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
      flush_timeout: 2
      retry_count: 5
      queue:
        max_batch_size: 50
        max_coalescing_delay: 1
        max_entries: 10000
    tags: [prod, logging]

  - name: request-transformer
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - "X-Forwarded-Proto:https"
    tags: [prod, defaults]

  - name: response-transformer
    config:
      remove:
        headers:
          - "Server"
    tags: [prod, defaults]

  - name: bot-detection
    config:
      deny: []
    tags: [prod, security]

  - name: proxy-cache
    config:
      strategy: memory
      content_type:
        - "application/json"
      cache_ttl: 30
      memory:
        dictionary_name: kong_cache
    tags: [prod, caching]
    enabled: false
